title: Zero-Sum Heart
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A game theorist and an artist who broke up in grad school are forced to share a studio residency in Berlin, where their bitter rivalry masks a truth they've been avoiding for seven years.
long_description: A game theorist and an artist who broke up in grad school are forced to share a studio residency in Berlin, where their bitter rivalry masks a truth they've been avoiding for seven years.
